Veterans Benefits: Pennsylvania exempts military retirement pay from state personal income tax and offers a real-estate tax exemption for qualifying disabled veterans and surviving spouses, plus education and assistance programs through the Department of Military and Veterans Affairs.
LGBTQSource: MAP Pennsylvania Equality Profile 2026; no HRC MEI coverage
Description: Philadelphia-area suburb in Upper Merion Township with a nearby VA outpatient clinic, high housing and overall living costs, and a nationally significant outdoor and history amenity at Valley Forge National Historical Park. It is a major retail and corporate corridor with access to the Philadelphia metro, but traffic and suburban car dependence are material tradeoffs.
